nasb.text: They said to him, “We have come down to bind you so that we may give you into the hands of the Philistines.” And Samson said to them, “Swear to me that you will not kill me.”

esv.text: And they said to him, “We have come down to bind you, that we may give you into the hands of the Philistines.” And Samson said to them, “Swear to me that you will not attack me yourselves.”

cnv.text: 猶大人對他說：“我們下來要捆綁你，把你交在非利士人手裡。”參孫對他們說：“你們要向我發誓，你們不親自殺害我。”

ccb.text: 犹大人说：“我们来是要捉拿你，把你交给非利士人。”参孙说：“你们要保证你们不会亲手杀我。”
